title: AI Caveman
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into a prehistoric portrait.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a realistic prehistoric Stone Age portrait. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, facial features, expression, pose, camera angle, and main composition. Reimagine clothing as rugged natural hides and simple woven materials, add primitive tools only where they fit the pose, place the subject in a natural cave or wilderness environment, and use cinematic firelight or daylight with documentary-quality photorealism. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: modern clothing, futuristic elements, cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, changed identity, distorted face, extra limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text, sci-fi technology, modern city, unrealistic proportions, noise, pixelation, cropped body, artifacts, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, extra people, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. stone age hunter, cave firelight...
